hero.title: Run your interview pipeline from one editorial command surface.
hero.lead: Monitor active sessions, spot stalled candidates, and keep scoring flows moving without dropping into separate admin tools.

active.label: Active
active.description: Interviews currently waiting on answers, uploads, or scoring.

candidates.label: Candidates
candidates.description: Total candidate records visible in the current workspace.

questionLoad.label: Question Load
questionLoad.description: Questions currently attached across all visible interviews.

completed.label: Completed interviews
completed.description: Finished sessions with scorecards ready for review and handoff.

lastSync.label: Last sync
lastSync.liveDescription: Updated against the live backend just now.

snapshot.title: Today's pipeline
snapshot.description: The redesigned shell uses tonal layers instead of hard separators, so activity stays readable even when the data density grows.

empty.title: No interviews yet
empty.description: Start with a candidate, attach questions from the bank, and this dashboard becomes your operating surface.
